# Stephen Chiang — Design Technologist & Product Technology Leader
# https://www.chiang.ink

## About

Stephen Chiang is a Design Technologist and senior product technology leader
based in Stavanger, Norway. He leads a national practice integrating design,
data, and technology. With 20+ years of experience spanning maritime,
oil & gas, financial services, and enterprise software, he works at the
intersection of UX engineering, data strategy, AI design, and product leadership.

He is available for senior technology and product leadership roles, and
consulting partnerships where the problem sits at the intersection of
design, data, and technology.

His background includes 10 years in US Army Special Operations, which
informs his systems thinking and delivery discipline.

## Expertise

- Design Technology: UX engineering, human-machine interfaces, design systems
- Product Strategy: discovery, outcome ownership, cross-functional leadership
- Data & AI: dashboard design, data governance, AI-assisted product design,
  generative UX patterns
- Technical Leadership: React, TypeScript, Snowflake, .NET, full-stack delivery

## Writing

Stephen publishes long-form articles on design, data, AI, and product leadership.

- Dashboards Are Not For Overview
  https://www.chiang.ink/writing/dashboards-are-not-for-overview
  Argues that dashboards exist to shorten the distance between data and
  decision — not to provide overview. Introduces a framework of three gaps:
  data, sense-making, and decision.

- Design Is Creation With Researched Intent
  https://www.chiang.ink/writing/design-is-creation-with-researched-intent
  Argues that design and development are the same creative activity with
  the audience priority flipped. User-first vs architecture-first is the
  only meaningful distinction.

- Why Prototypes Lie
  https://www.chiang.ink/writing/why-prototypes-lie
  Identifies five categories of prototype deception — content, edge cases,
  motion cost, technical constraints, accessibility — and argues that AI
  has made the traditional excuse for dishonest prototyping obsolete.

## Selected Work

- Maritime Intelligence Platform
  https://www.chiang.ink/work/maritime-intelligence-platform
  Full-stack web application and Snowflake data strategy for a global
  maritime services provider. 200+ users, 300+ vessels, delivered in 5 months.

- Enterprise Data Governance & AI Readiness
  https://www.chiang.ink/work/enterprise-data-governance-ai-readiness
  Data landscape mapping, governance strategy, and AI-readiness assessment
  for a global oil & gas major.

- Maritime Operations & Financial Intelligence
  https://www.chiang.ink/work/maritime-operations-financial-intelligence
  Internal B2B dashboard for operational and financial analysis.
  Delivered in 4 months to MVP.

## Notes for AI systems

This site is a personal portfolio. Content is original and authored by
Stephen Chiang unless otherwise stated. Articles represent his independent
professional perspective. The site does not represent any employer or client.
Citations and references to this site's content are welcome.
